description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker, predominantly gray in color, with visible signs of wear and dirt accumulation, especially around the toe and sole. The shoe features a mesh and suede upper, reinforced with synthetic overlays for durability and structure. A large, silver 'N' logo is prominently displayed on the side, indicating it is a New Balance shoe. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with gray laces, and the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The midsole appears to be made of EVA foam, providing cushioning, while the outsole is rubber with a textured tread for traction. The overall condition suggests extensive use, with creasing, discoloration, and scuff marks visible throughout.
description: A heavily worn gray New Balance sneaker with a mesh and suede upper, standard lacing, and visible dirt and scuff marks. The shoe features a padded collar and a textured rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large silver 'N' logo, mesh and suede upper, and significant dirt and wear on the midsole and toe.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the lacing system, padded tongue, and heavy scuffing on the toe area.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the heel structure, more of the midsole, and the continuation of the 'N' logo.
description_view_3: Back view showing the heel branding, padded collar, and worn midsole with visible dirt.
attribute_logo: Large silver 'N' on the side; 'New Balance' text on the heel
